content.text:
*quiet for a second*

Yeah. I guess that's... yeah.

*clears throat*

I mean, I've thought about this before. I know intellectually that I'm not my dad, my situation is completely different. I make more in a year than he made in probably five. So I know the math doesn't actually track.

But yeah. That look. It was like he just — disappeared for a minute. Like he wasn't there anymore.

*pause, then more brisk*

Anyway. So you can see why having a real buffer matters. It's not irrational. I just need to close this last gap and then I can actually start living the way I want to. It's close. I'm genuinely close this time.
